{{Quote|They gave you the best. And it's in as fine a shape as I can make it.|Grembae to Wedge Antilles|<ref name="SOA" />}}
'''Grembae''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Adumari]] who served as a [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] for the [[Yedagon Confederacy]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]]. She worked on [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles's]] [[X-wing starfighter|X-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] before the [[Adumari Civil War]].<ref name="SOA" />

She had a [[Grembae's son|son]], who was also a mechanic in her team.<ref name="SOA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{1st}}
